english: Salutations to Lakshmi-Narasimha, giver of fearlessness to devotees
roman: Lakshmi Nrisimha namastubhyam bhaktanam abhaya prada

english: The god who gave boons to Prahlada and slew Hiranyakashipu
roman: Prahlada varadam devam Hiranya kashipu ghna kam

hindi: लक्ष्मीनृसिंह जय जय, जय जय लक्ष्मीनृसिंह।
english: Victory to Lakshmi-Narasimha, victory, victory, victory to Lakshmi-Narasimha
roman: Lakshmi Nrisimha jaya jaya jaya jaya Lakshmi Nrisimha

english: Victory at Ahobala, victory to Lakshmi-Narasimha
roman: Ahobale Ahobala jaya jaya Lakshmi Nrisimha

hindi: उग्र नृसिंह भद्र नृसिंह, लक्ष्मी नृसिंह।
roman: Ugra Nrisimha bhadra Nrisimha Lakshmi Nrisimha

hindi: योग नृसिंह ज्वाला नृसिंह, पाहि नृसिंह॥
english: Yoga Narasimha, flaming Narasimha — protect us O Narasimha
roman: Yoga Nrisimha Jvala Nrisimha pahi Nrisimha

english: Whoever reads this Lakshmi-Narasimha Stotram with devotion always
roman: Lakshmi Nrisimha stotram yah pathed bhaktitah sada

english: By the grace of Narasimha all fear is certainly destroyed
